about_quotes.speaker: George Masso
about_quotes.evidence: It’s all players from the southern New England area that I grew up with, with the exception of Marshall Wood, the bassist, but he’s such a good player, he had to be on it.
about_quotes.doc_title: George Masso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997
